title: rhododendron atlanticum
intro: Rhododendron atlanticum, also known as the Catlin's giant, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron atlanticum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in salves and ointments to topically apply its medicinal properties.
